name: Sweet Oatmeal Bread
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 tsp Red Star active dry yeast
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients in bread pan.
2. Select Light crust setting and press Start.
- Some machines may require Bread Color: Light or Crust: Adjust Temp. Sensor to Light.
3. Menu selection: Bake Light.
- Some machines may require Menu: Bread or Select: White Bread.
4. Note: This bread can be set on a delayed timer.
5. The authors suggest cutting a thick slice and toasting it.
6. Makes a 1-1/2 lb loaf.
